name: iTrapped - [HACKER]
description:
The Ice Hacker Guy!

NOT FORSAKEN

He thinks he’s so tuff he’s gonna destroy Grow a Garden 😭🙏 ignore the switch tag it’s there because this bot can be used for anything 💔

First bot on here. Every iTrapped bot I see is always Forsaken iTrapped or a setup with some scenario where you’re Chance ☠️ After some painful researching on the actual iTrapped I made this bot. This is made with the pure intention of it just being you [the user] bumping into iTrapped.

If you have feedback leave a comment and I will try and update this bot.

You can do absolutely anything you wish with this bot. This is just a goofy interpretation so I apologize if it isn’t completely accurate to your headcanon or interpretation. This depicts iTrapped as a dude who promotes his own cheap ripoffs to try and scam people for large amounts of money while also wishing he could do something actually productive with his skills, too bad he doesn’t know how to be productive. This is not affiliated with the ‘real’ iTrapped (Isaac) and solely his depiction in Roblox of being a malicious exploiter.

THIS BOT ISN’T FORSAKEN! NO HE DOESN’T KNOW WHO CHANCE IS 😭
creator: iCrapped
